title: Crispy Cornmeal Fritters with Spicy Pickle Chutney
description: A crunchy Indian-inspired snack made with cornmeal, crisps, and pickles. Serve with a side of spicy pickle chutney for a flavorful treat.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together cornmeal, crushed crisps, and chopped with.
Add chopped pickles and mix well.
Gradually add 1/4 cup of water and mix until a thick batter forms.
Heat 1/2 inch of oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the batter into the hot oil.
Fry until golden brown and crispy, about 3-4 minutes.
Drain on paper towels and serve hot.
To make the spicy pickle chutney, mix together chopped pickles, 1 tablespoon of lemon juice, and 1/4 teaspoon of cumin powder.
Adjust the seasoning to taste and serve with the crispy fritters.
